caption: In a formal setting featuring wood-paneled walls and Israeli flags, three men are seated at a long table. One man wears a white button-down shirt and looks down at a black folder, while another wears a dark suit, white shirt, and red tie, gesturing with his right hand. A third man, partially visible on the left, wears a beige garment and a head covering. On the table are nameplates and bottles of water. The screen features a news overlay with a purple "plustv" logo and a banner that reads "FOREIGN NEWS" above the headline "NUCLEAR PROGRAMME" and the subtext "ISRAEL EXPECTS I.A.E.A. TO GIVE IRAN CLEAR WARNING AHEAD." At the bottom, there is a "SUBSCRIBE" button and the URL "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA." Across the sequence, the men remain in their positions, with the man in the suit continuing to gesture as the man in the white shirt holds his folder.
